## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/build/automation update

## Validation

- [ ] `ruff check src tests`
- [ ] `PYTHONPATH=. pytest tests/test_server.py -q`
- [ ] Relevant live/integration tests (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated documentation where needed.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets or credentials.
- [ ] I considered backward compatibility and migration impact.

## Linked Issues

Closes #<issue-number>
